acceptance_criteria_results.description: Relative customTargetPath resolved to absolute path under basePath
acceptance_criteria_results.notes: resolveCustomTargetPath('my-repo', '/tmp/repos') returns '/tmp/repos/my-repo'. Verified by unit tests H-001 and T-001/T-002.

acceptance_criteria_results.description: Resolved absolute path used consistently in existsSync/createCloneJob/executeClone/onCloneSuccess
acceptance_criteria_results.notes: After resolveCustomTargetPath() returns the resolved path, the same targetPath variable flows through existsSync (L380), createCloneJob (L388), executeClone (L392), and onCloneSuccess (L467). Verified by test T-005 (existsSync called with '/tmp/repos/my-repo').

acceptance_criteria_results.description: DB targetPath is always an absolute path under basePath
acceptance_criteria_results.notes: Tests T-001 and T-002 verify getCloneJob(db, jobId).targetPath equals '/tmp/repos/my-repo' and '/tmp/repos/nested/deep/repo' respectively. Integration test R-001 verifies '/test/clone-root/my-repo'.

executeClone() calls path.dirname(targetPath) which is already validated to be under basePath. Since targetPath is always an absolute path under basePath (ensured by resolveCustomTargetPath), parentDir is also under basePath.
Tests H-002 (resolveCustomTargetPath returns null for '../escape') and T-003 (startCloneJob returns error code INVALID_TARGET_PATH) both pass.

acceptance_criteria_results.description: Error response does not contain basePath/rootDir (D4-001)
acceptance_criteria_results.notes: Tests T-006 verifies error message does not contain '/tmp/repos'. Security test 'should not include basePath value in path traversal error message' verifies '/secret/internal/path' is not leaked. resolveCustomTargetPath uses fixed message '[CloneManager] Invalid custom target path rejected' for console.warn.

acceptance_criteria_results.description: Existing absolute path customTargetPath tests still pass
acceptance_criteria_results.notes: Test T-004 verifies backward compatibility: startCloneJob with '/tmp/repos/custom/target/path' (absolute) succeeds and DB stores the exact path. Original test 'should use custom target path if provided' also passes.

acceptance_criteria_results.description: existsSync called with resolved absolute path
acceptance_criteria_results.notes: Test T-005 explicitly verifies vi.mocked(existsSync).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/tmp/repos/my-repo') after calling startCloneJob with relative path 'my-repo'.

route.ts L98: trimmedTargetDir = targetDir?.trim() || undefined. Integration test R-001 sends '  my-repo  ' and verifies job.targetPath equals '/test/clone-root/my-repo'. Test R-002 verifies whitespace-only targetDir treated as undefined.

route.ts L97: MAX_TARGET_DIR_LENGTH = 1024, L99: rejects trimmedTargetDir.length > MAX_TARGET_DIR_LENGTH. Integration test R-003 sends 'a'.repeat(1025) and verifies 400 status with INVALID_TARGET_PATH code.

security_checks.d4_001_details: Error responses use ERROR_DEFINITIONS.INVALID_TARGET_PATH with fixed message 'Target path is invalid or outside allowed directory'. Console.warn uses fixed string '[CloneManager] Invalid custom target path rejected'. Three tests verify: (1) secretBasePath not in error message, (2) full targetPath not in DIRECTORY_EXISTS message, (3) '/tmp/repos' not in path traversal error.
security_checks.s1_001_details: console.warn('[CloneManager] Invalid custom target path rejected') is called in resolveCustomTargetPath() catch block (clone-manager.ts L205). Uses fixed message to avoid leaking rootDir from exception messages.
security_checks.s4_001_details: S4-001-T1: double-encoded '%252e%252e%252fetc' resolves to '/tmp/repos/%2e%2e%2fetc' (literal directory name, no bypass). S4-001-T2: single-encoded '..%2fetc' is correctly rejected (returns null). S4-001-T3: 'normal-repo' resolves to '/tmp/repos/normal-repo'.

test_scenarios_results.description: POST with relative path 'my-repo' -> DB targetPath is absolute
test_scenarios_results.evidence: Unit test T-001 and integration test R-001 both verify the relative path is resolved to basePath + '/my-repo'.
Unit test T-003 verifies startCloneJob returns success:false with error code INVALID_TARGET_PATH for path traversal.

test_scenarios_results.description: POST with absolute path within basePath -> success
test_scenarios_results.evidence: Unit test T-004 verifies backward compatibility with absolute path '/tmp/repos/custom/target/path'.

test_scenarios_results.description: POST with '  my-repo  ' -> trimmed and succeeds
test_scenarios_results.evidence: Integration test R-001 sends '  my-repo  ' and verifies job.targetPath is '/test/clone-root/my-repo'.
Integration test R-003 sends 'a'.repeat(1025) and verifies 400 status with INVALID_TARGET_PATH.

summary: All 10 acceptance criteria (AC-1 through AC-10) are satisfied. All 75 tests pass (60 unit + 15 integration). Zero TypeScript errors and zero ESLint errors. Security checks D4-001 (no path leak in error messages), S1-001 (console.warn logging with fixed message), and S4-001 (double-decode safety) all pass. The implementation correctly resolves relative customTargetPath values to absolute paths under basePath using resolveCustomTargetPath(), which wraps validateWorktreePath(). The route.ts layer adds trim() and 1024-character length limit as defense-in-depth measures.
message: All acceptance criteria verified. Issue #392 implementation is complete and correct.
